title: Russell Howard
full_description: After 237 gigs in 141 cities in 30 countries, Russell Howard brings his acclaimed stand-up show home — recorded at the iconic London Palladium. A tsunami of feelgood humour building giddy anecdotes into something bigger; one of the most effective political stand-ups in the world for the way he keeps any crowd on board, didactic without being divisive.
ai_summary: The largest international stand-up tour of Russell Howard's career — 237 shows across 30 countries — concludes with a recording at the London Palladium, showcasing his signature feel-good warmth and increasingly sharp political comedy.
